svg.text: From Raw News to Published Podcast Episodes
Automate the full podcast pipeline — ingest news, generate grounded
LLM scripts, synthesize multi-voice audio, and publish.
Cast It turns tech news into multi-voice podcast episodes.
Articles are summarized, ranked, and selected; a multi-stage
LLM pipeline writes grounded dialogue; Chatterbox + FFmpeg
produce final audio; Celery orchestrates retries and schedules.
Script generation is manual from the Operations Dashboard.
Feedback: retry sweep · provider health · pipeline monitor
